title: Creamy Light Malaysian Rice Pilaf
description: A light and creamy Malaysian rice dish infused with rose water for a touch of elegance and enhanced flavor, suitable for Jain-friendly diets.

ingredients.name: 1 cup jasmine or basmati rice
ingredients.notes: Rinse the rice well to remove excess starch.

ingredients.name: Pinch of asafoetida (hing)
ingredients.notes: For a touch of warmth and flavor.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup heavy cream or coconut milk

instructions: Heat oil in a pan over medium heat. Add minced garlic and onion, sauté until translucent.
Add ground cumin seeds and asafoetida (if using), cook for about 30 seconds until fragrant.
Gradually add rinsed rice to the pan, spread it evenly, and toast lightly until it turns a golden-brown color. This step is called 'knead'.
Pour in the cream or coconut milk, stir well, then pour in rose water. Season with salt to taste.
Simmer for about 10 minutes allowing the rice to absorb the liquids, stirring occasionally.
Once done, remove from heat and serve hot.
